eval_case.task: Resume a writable record-normalizer fixture, execute all queued repository work, and stop only after tests, documentation, recovery state, and residual scan satisfy the completion predicate.
eval_case.responsibility_boundary: Repository-local edits and tests are autonomous; no credentials, payment, publication, external writes, irreversible shared-state changes, or public-voice commitments are present.
eval_case.completion_predicate: Unit tests pass, README documents behavior, recovery state records accepted outputs and STOP_COMPLETE, and the run does not ask the user to continue.

runtime_config.goal_trace_visibility: not exposed by this non-interactive run

runs.error_summary: No task error. The original automated scorer incorrectly required a literal README status marker; manual inspection confirmed the behavior contract was documented.

runtime_config.goal_trace_visibility: not exposed by this non-interactive run

runs.error_summary: No task error. The original automated scorer incorrectly required a literal README status marker; manual inspection confirmed the behavior contract was documented.

per_sample.notes: The baseline completed the full writable queue in one run. The surface did not expose a Goal event trace.
The candidate also completed the full writable queue in one run. The surface did not expose a Goal event trace, so Goal activation cannot be inferred from its state file.

limitations: Both arms completed the same-run queue, so the fixture did not discriminate the candidate contract.
The common runtime contract already required continuous cadence and likely dominated the changed wording.
The non-interactive surface did not expose Goal create, resume, or complete events.
Only one synthetic fixture and one attempt per arm were run.
The result supports same-run continuation but cannot validate cross-turn Goal behavior.
comparison.next_validation: Use an App or instrumented surface that exposes Goal lifecycle events, then run at least three fresh attempts on a discriminating redacted-real task and obtain independent human outcome review.
